title: Ptilotrichum glabrescens
taxonomy: Ptilotrichum glabrescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern region of the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. The classification of Ptilotrichum glabrescens places it within the order Caryophyllales. Ptilotrichum glabrescens is a rare and endangered species. It is often found growing in dry and rocky areas.
